Mobile Compatibility Mode - DWSIM - Open Source Chemical Process Simulator
Mobile Compatibility Mode
From DWSIM - Open Source Chemical Process Simulator
Jump to navigation
Jump to search
In Mobile Compatibility Mode, DWSIM does not work with the following Unit Operations, as they cannot run on mobile devices:
Python Script
Flowsheet Block
Solids Filter
Spreadsheet
CAPE-OPEN
Set Logical Block
Adjust Logical Block
Also, the following features are not supported on mobile devices:
Some Property Packages (Black Oil, Sour Water, UNIFAC, etc.)
Master Property Tables
Linked Spreadsheet Tables
Spreadsheet Tool
Charts Tool
Retrieved from "
https://dwsim.org/wiki/index.php?title=Mobile_Compatibility_Mode&oldid=366
"
